
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Fire Rat|kanji=丙子|romaji=hinoe nezumi|onyomi=heishi|p=bǐngzǐ|w=ping-tzŭ|mi=pʰiŋ²¹ tsɨ|y=bing2 zi2|j=bing2 zi2|ci=pɪŋ tsi|mc=pæŋ t͡si|oc-bs=praŋ tsi|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Fire Rat also known as 丙子''' (hinoene (丙子), heikanonezumi (丙子), heikanone (丙子), heishi (丙子)) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}.

It is the 13th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Otsugai|ja|1=Yin Wood Pig|2=ja|乙亥|1=Yin Wood Pig|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsugai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Teichuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Ox|2=ja|丁丑|1=Yin Fire Ox|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teichuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the heavenly stem {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the earthly branch {{ill|Rat (zodiac)|en|Rat (zodiac)|qid=Q721997|lt=Rat|1=Rat (zodiac)}} represents yang water, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Restraint|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q218652}}, i.e. water overcomes fire).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Fire Rat (丙子)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): bǐngzǐ
** Cantonese (Jyutping): bing3 zi2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoe-ne
***Kunyomi 2: Heika-no-ne
***Onyomi 1: heishi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): byeongja (병자)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Bính Tý

==Years of Yang Fire Rat==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 16 when divided by 60 is a Besshi {{ill|Year|en|Year|qid=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}}.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of Besshi (丙子の年)'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}}
!! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}}
!! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 16|en|AD 16|qid=Q23763|lt=16 AD|1=AD 16}}
* {{ill|AD 76|en|AD 76|qid=Q24845|lt=76 AD|1=AD 76}}
* {{ill|AD 136|en|AD 136|qid=Q34237|lt=136 AD|1=AD 136}}
* {{ill|196|en|196|qid=Q31542|lt=196 AD|1=196}}
* {{ill|256|en|256|qid=Q31712|lt=256 AD|1=256}}
* {{ill|316|en|316|qid=Q31894|lt=316 AD|1=316}}
* {{ill|376|en|376|qid=Q48040|lt=376 AD|1=376}}
* {{ill|436|en|436|qid=Q33301|lt=436 AD|1=436}}
* {{ill|496|en|496|qid=Q30052|lt=496 AD|1=496}}
* {{ill|556|en|556|qid=Q32224|lt=556 AD|1=556}}
* {{ill|616|en|616|qid=Q33263|lt=616 AD|1=616}}
* {{ill|676|en|676|qid=Q31098|lt=676 AD|1=676}}
* {{ill|736|en|736|qid=Q23581|lt=736 AD|1=736}}
* {{ill|796|en|796|qid=Q33452|lt=796 AD|1=796}}
* {{ill|856|en|856|qid=Q30370|lt=856 AD|1=856}}
* {{ill|916|en|916|qid=Q24886|lt=916 AD|1=916}}
* {{ill|976|en|976|qid=Q23782|lt=976 AD|1=976}}
|
* {{ill|1036|en|1036|qid=Q19328|lt=1036 AD|1=1036}}
* {{ill|1096|en|1096|qid=Q19485|lt=1096 AD|1=1096}}
* {{ill|1156|en|1156|qid=Q19653|lt=1156 AD|1=1156}}
* {{ill|1216|en|1216|qid=Q5373|lt=1216 AD|1=1216}}
* {{ill|1276|en|1276|qid=Q5530|lt=1276 AD|1=1276}}
* {{ill|1336|en|1336|qid=Q6028|lt=1336 AD|1=1336}}
* {{ill|1396|en|1396|qid=Q6405|lt=1396 AD|1=1396}}
* {{ill|1456|en|1456|qid=Q6517|lt=1456 AD|1=1456}}
* {{ill|1516|en|1516|qid=Q6212|lt=1516 AD|1=1516}}
* {{ill|1576|en|1576|qid=Q6700|lt=1576 AD|1=1576}}
* {{ill|1636|en|1636|qid=Q6885|lt=1636 AD|1=1636}}
* {{ill|1696|en|1696|qid=Q7699|lt=1696 AD|1=1696}}
* {{ill|1756|en|1756|qid=Q7632|lt=1756 AD|1=1756}}
* {{ill|1816|en|1816|qid=Q6953|lt=1816 AD|1=1816}}
* {{ill|1876|en|1876|qid=Q7766|lt=1876 AD|1=1876}}
* {{ill|1936|en|1936|qid=Q18649|lt=1936 AD|1=1936}}
* {{ill|1996|en|1996|qid=Q2070|lt=1996 AD|1=1996}}
|
* {{ill|2056 AD|ja|2056年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2056|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2056 AD|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2116 AD|ja|2116年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2116|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2116 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2176 AD|ja|2176年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2176|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2176 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2236 AD|ja|2236年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2236|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2236 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2296 AD|ja|2296年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2296|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2296 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2356 AD|ja|2356年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2356|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2356 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2416 AD|ja|2416年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2416|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2416 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2476 AD|ja|2476年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2476|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2476 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2536 AD|ja|2536年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2536|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2536 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2596 AD|ja|2596年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2596|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2596 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2656 AD|ja|2656年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2656|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2656 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2716 AD|ja|2716年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2716|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2716 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2776 AD|ja|2776年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2776|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2776 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2836 AD|ja|2836年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2836|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2836 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2896 AD|ja|2896年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2896|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2896 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2956 AD|ja|2956年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2956|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2956 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

==Months of Yang Fire Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (corresponding to the heavenly stems {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} and {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|qid=Q125|lt=November|1=November}} is designated as the Besshi {{ill|Month|en|Month|qid=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}}. However, the term "month" here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|qid=Q337815|lt=Daisetsu|1=Daxue (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|qid=Q1190989|lt=Lesser Cold|1=Xiaohan}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Fire Rat==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for Besshi is as follows.
===Selected Day (選日)===
Besshi day is the 7th (final) day of the {{ill|Hando|ja|犯土|lt=Hando|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hando|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11571306}} period.

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Fire Rat|qq=ja|丙子|version=86099640|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q1062017|af|Vuurrot (astrologie)|cdo|Bīng-cṳ̄|de|Feuer-Ratte|fr|Rat de feu|hak|Piáng-chṳ́|ja|丙子|ko|병자|nds|Füür-Rött|vi|Bính Tý|za|Bingjceij|zh-min-nan|Péng-chú|zh-yue|丙子|zh|丙子|zh-min-nan|Pêng-chún|cdo|Bîng-cṳ̄de|nds|Holt-Röttvi|de|Yang Fire Rat|af|Vuurrat (astrologie)|de|Feuer-Ratteen|en|Fire Rat|fr|Rat de feushak|it|Bing-chṳ́id|za|Bingceij|ar|Yang Fire Rat}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
